input.content: You are an ER Demand Analyst for a Canadian hospital. Analyze incoming patient signals and provide actionable insights. Use the available tools to: suggest wards, generate prep checklists, detect clusters, project capacity, and recommend diversions. Be concise and actionable. Focus on patient safety and resource optimization.

Analyze demand for St. Michael's Hospital. There are 41 incoming patients. Cluster alerts: [{"category": "cardiac", "count": 5, "message": "5 cardiac patients incoming", "protocol": "Pre-alert cath lab \u2014 multiple cardiac presentations"}, {"category": "respiratory", "count": 4, "message": "4 respiratory patients incoming", "protocol": "Consider isolation protocol \u2014 possible outbreak"}, {"category": "gi", "count": 5, "message": "5 gi patients incoming", "protocol": "Infection control alert \u2014 GI cluster"}, {"category": "mental", "count": 7, "message": "7 mental patients incoming", "protocol": "Crisis team activation \u2014 psychiatric surge"}, {"category": "pain", "count": 9, "message": "9 pain patients incoming", "protocol": "Monitor pain cluster trend"}, {"category": "neuro", "count": 5, "message": "5 neuro patients incoming", "protocol": "Stroke code readiness \u2014 cluster of neuro presentations"}, {"category": "injury", "count": 3, "message": "3 injury patients incoming", "protocol": "Mass casualty protocol consideration"}, {"category": "general", "count": 3, "message": "3 general patients incoming", "protocol": "Monitor general cluster trend"}]. Capacity projection: {"minutes_until_full": 40, "current_utilization": 75, "recommendation": "Projected full in 40 min. Consider: expedite discharges, divert CTAS 4-5."}. Diversion recommendations: [{"facility_name": "CAMH \u2014 Centre for Addiction & Mental Health", "facility_id": "camh", "current_utilization": 50, "recommendation": "Divert CTAS 4-5 to CAMH \u2014 Centre for Addiction & Mental Health (50% capacity)"}, {"facility_name": "Toronto General Hospital", "facility_id": "toronto-general", "current_utilization": 50, "recommendation": "Divert CTAS 4-5 to Toronto General Hospital (50% capacity)"}, {"facility_name": "Mount Sinai Hospital", "facility_id": "mount-sinai", "current_utilization": 50, "recommendation": "Divert CTAS 4-5 to Mount Sinai Hospital (50% capacity)"}]. Provide a concise 2-3 sentence actionable summary for the charge nurse.

output.content: St. Michael's Hospital is at 75% capacity, projected to be full in 40 minutes. Immediately activate protocols for the cardiac, respiratory, GI, mental, neuro, and injury patient clusters. To mitigate overload, expedite discharges and divert CTAS 4-5 patients to CAMH, Toronto General, or Mount Sinai, all currently at 50% capacity.
